message.content:
@startuml
title Digital Public Goods Backlog\nBasic architecture

actor User as u1
participant "backlog.dpg.net" as bdpn
participant "api.backlog.dpg.net" as abdpn
database Database as db

u1 ->> bdpn : HTTP GET /projects
bdpn ->> abdpn : HTTP GET /projects
abdpn ->> db : Query the projects table
db --> abdpn : Return the results
abdpn --> bdpn : JSON response
bdpn --> u1 : HTML response

@enduml
